name: brithday-ini
description: Grushon's Birthday invitation app - Next.js frontend + NestJS API + Neon Postgres

scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build -w @bday/api && npm run build -w @bday/web
scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && concurrently -n api,web -c green,cyan "npm:dev:api" "npm:dev:web"
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:shared && tsc -p apps/api/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p apps/web/tsconfig.json --noEmit
